name: Cold Lemon Souffle- Micro Kitchen Companion
recipeInstructions:
1. Place egg yolks, 3/4 cup sugar, lemon juice and zest in a heavy saucepan.
2. Cook over low heat, stirring constantly, until the mixture thickens enough to coat a spoon.
3. Remove from heat. Sprinkle gelatin over cold water and allow it to soften.
4. Add the softened gelatin to the yolk mixture and stir until it begins to set.
5. In a separate bowl, beat egg whites with cream of tartar.
6. Gradually add remaining sugar to the beaten egg whites, beating until stiff peaks form.
7. Beat heavy cream until soft peaks form.
8. Stir 1 cup of the whipped egg whites into the yolk mixture.
9. Gently fold in the remaining egg whites and then fold in the cream.
10. Transfer the mixture to an 8-cup souffle dish.
11. Chill at least 4 hours.
12. Decorate with rosettes of whipped cream and fruit such as strawberries and kiwis.
